productDisplayName: Puma Men Basket Team Mesh White Casual Shoes
description: The Basket II Team Mesh shoes from puma are a fresh take on the Basket Classics from the puma archives. First launched in 1971, this all-time classic retro-style will never be out of date. The leather upper provides comfort and durability while the rubber outsole offers absolute grip.UpperLeather upper with mesh side panels for great breathability and style with synthetic formstripe Central lacing system with nubuck lining for snug, customised FitLightly padded collar for snug fit Synthetic overlay on the heel cup and nubuck overlay on heel for absolute durability and styleMidsoleLightly padded insole for added comfort. EVA midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with square grooves for durability and traction
